template.name: suspense_resolve_unrecognized_credit
template.description: Resolves an orphaned inbound credit sitting in Suspense by debiting the Suspense account and crediting an investigation-identified destination account (e.g., fees offset or income) in the Economic ledger.

financial_statements_impact.description: Suspense asset is debited to clear the orphaned inbound credit balance.
Bank Fees expense is credited, reducing net expense (e.g., fee refund or operational credit offset).

template.trigger: Investigation identifies the destination for an unrecognized inbound credit previously flushed to Suspense from bank statement ingestion.

ledger_scope_descriptions.primary: Economic (statutory) ledger for the entity where suspense is maintained and the allocation is recorded (single-ledger USD-only setup).

accounting_treatments.description: Reclassify an orphaned inbound credit from suspense/clearing to its final destination account once the underlying nature is identified.
Manual/accounting adjustment used to resolve a suspense anomaly based on investigation outcomes and supporting evidence.

account_code_validations.description: Reconciliation suspense / mixing bowl asset account (Master FBO - Suspense).
Bank Fees expense account for resolved credits (fee refunds, operational credits).

credit_description.description: Human-readable description of what the credit represents (e.g., 'bank interest payment', 'fee refund', 'operational credit from bank').

bank_statement_reference.description: Reference to the original bank statement line that triggered the suspense entry via Template 4001/4002.

approver.description: Name or ID of the approver authorizing this suspense resolution.

original_suspense_event_id.description: Optional event ID of the Template 4002 event that created the orphaned suspense entry.

investigation_reference.description: Reference ID for the investigation that identified the nature of the unrecognized credit.

validations.description: Suspense and destination accounts must be different — cannot resolve a suspense entry to itself.
validations.name: accounts_are_distinct

legs.description: Resolve an orphaned inbound credit from suspense to the investigation-identified destination.

extra_metadata.credit_description: Bank fee refund for February 2026 wire processing fee

examples.name: bank_fee_refund_25
examples.description: A $25.00 bank fee previously charged is refunded by the bank. The credit appeared on the statement with no matching Clearing entry. Investigation identifies it as a fee refund. Suspense is debited and Bank Fees (50100) is credited, reducing the net fee expense.

extra_metadata.credit_description: Bank operational credit — FBO account balance adjustment

examples.name: bank_operational_credit_150
examples.description: A $150.00 operational credit from the bank (e.g., a balance adjustment) appeared on the statement with no matching Clearing entry. Investigation identifies it as a bank-initiated operational credit. Suspense is debited and Bank Fees (50100) is credited as a contra-expense offset.
